subject: A massive horned minotaur warrior wreathed in fire, wielding flaming chains or whips and surging forward against a blazing red-orange background
description: A hulking minotaur figure dominates the frame, body angled in a forward-charging three-quarter stance. Heavy curved horns sweep back from his head; his musculature is exaggerated and bestial. Flaming chains or whips wrap around his arms and trail through the air, casting bright sparks. The entire background is consumed by hellish red and orange flames, with no discernible landscape — only fire and embers. His skin reads as dark, ashen, and partially desiccated, suggesting an undead or zombified condition. The lighting is harsh chiaroscuro, with the fire serving as the dominant rim and key light, throwing his silhouette into sharp relief.
foreground: minotaur warrior with flaming chains/whips, charging pose
background: wall of fire and smoke, no landscape visible
emotion: ferocious aggression, snarling charge, unrelenting menace
